shine.config.title: Shine Settings
shine.config.group.overrides_in_use.desc: Blocks with explicit custom bloom source strengths. Set a value back to default to remove the override.
shine.config.group.global.desc: General bloom behavior shared across all blocks.
shine.config.group.default_source_streng: Fallback bloom source strength for blocks without explicit overrides.
shine.config.group.unused_blocks.desc: Collapsed list of blocks currently using defaults. Changing a value creates an override.
shine.config.overrides.empty.desc: Add a new override from the 'Add Block Overrides' category.
shine.config.default_light_source_streng: Used for light-emitting blocks when no per-block override exists.
Used for non-emissive blocks when no per-block override exists.
shine.config.block_override.desc: Default: %s. Fluids use fluid ID and legacy fluid-block ID (for example, minecraft:water).
shine.config.enabled.desc: Master switch for the bloom post effect.
shine.config.strength.desc: Final bloom contribution added back to the scene.
shine.config.threshold.desc: Minimum brightness required before pixels enter the bloom pass.
shine.config.highlight_clamp.desc: Caps brightness entering bloom extraction. Lower values reduce blinding bloom on pale bright surfaces.
shine.config.soft_knee.desc: Controls how gradually pixels transition into bloom above the threshold.
shine.config.radius.desc: Controls how strongly bloom spreads into larger pyramid levels. Values above 100 and 200 can activate additional coarse levels for more spread.
shine.config.blur_pass_count.desc: Controls how many bloom pyramid levels are active. Higher values cost more but produce a broader glow.
shine.config.distance.desc: Live camera radius for bloom. Lower values cut off bloom on distant pixels.
